text: Agniveer Agniveer Complete digital platform managing Agniveer Agnipath scheme — recruitment, training, medical, performance analytics, and stipend for all serving Agniveers. Platform Features What You Can Do Online Application Apply online and upload your documents securely. Track your application, get instant updates, and stay notified at every step. Admit Card Download your hall ticket once verified. Get key exam details and timely alerts so you never miss important info. Training Tracking Track your training progress with dashboards. Receive feedback and see milestones for all aspects of your preparation. Performance Analytics Access detailed analytics for your scores, rankings, and strengths. Get tailored reports and actionable insights to improve. Medical Records Keep your health records safe and accessible only to doctors. Review history, appointments, and medical status easily. Stipend Portal View and download pay slips, check deductions, and track your Seva Nidhi fund growth with transparent records. Official Notices Announcements Agnipath Recruitment Rally 2025 — Online applications open till 31 March 2025 New 10 Mar 2025 Physical Fitness Test date for Batch 2025-A — 15 April 2025 New 08 Mar 2025 March stipend disbursed for all active Agniveers 28 Feb 2025 New training module: Advanced Weapons Handling from April 2025 25 Feb 2025 Annual medical examinations scheduled for April–May 2025 20 Feb 2025 February 2025 performance rankings now published on portal 15 Feb 2025 Ready to serve the nation? Agnipath Batch 2025 open. Last date: 31 March 2025.
